1952 圭多·卡斯特尔努沃之死 G. 卡斯特尔努沃
1957 费舍尔关于吸烟危害的论战 费舍尔
1958 极端统计数据 的发布 EJ Gumbel
1959 Box 使用了“稳健”一词 GEP Box
1959 假设检验的最终表述 EL Lehmann
1960 组合概率D. FN David，E. Burton
1962 萨维奇-德菲内蒂个人概率理论的构建 LJ Savage，B. de Finetti
1962 费舍尔的最后一篇论文探讨了遗传学中的性别差异。 费舍尔
1962 罗纳德·艾尔默·费舍尔之死 A. 费舍尔
1964 塞缪尔·S·威尔克斯之死 SS 威尔克斯
1964 “变换分析” GEP Box，考克斯博士
1966 弗朗西斯科·保罗·坎泰利去世 FP Cantelli
1967 Hájek 的等级测试公式 J. Hájek
1969 全国氟烷研究（包括对数线性模型的研究） YMM主教及其他人士
1970 南希·曼恩关于可靠性理论和威布尔分布的第一篇论文 N. 曼恩
1970 游戏、神明与赌博 FN David
1971 保罗·莱维之死 P. 莱维
1971 LJ（“吉米”）·萨维奇之死 LJ·萨维奇
1972 普林斯顿稳健估计研究（普林斯顿稳健性研究） DF Andrews、PJ Bickel、FR Hampel、PJ Huber、WH Rogers、JW Tukey
1972 普拉桑塔·钱德拉·马哈拉诺比斯之死 PC Mahalanobis
1975 斯特拉·坎利夫当选皇家统计学会主席 SV Cunliffe
1976 《科学与统计学：显著性检验的应用视角》 GEP Box
1977 Cox提出的显著性检验方法 考克斯博士
1977 发布探索性数据分析 J·图基
1978 格特鲁德·M·考克斯之死 通用汽车考克斯
1979 切斯特·布利斯之死 C. 布利斯
1979 杰罗姆·康菲尔德之死 J·康菲尔德
1979 珍妮特·诺伍德被任命为劳工统计局局长 J·诺伍德
1980 埃贡·S·皮尔逊之死 ES Pearson
1981 杰日·内曼之死 J·内曼
1982 混沌理论的现代表述 R·亚伯拉罕，C·肖
1983 研究表明个人概率的局限性 A. 特沃斯基，D. 卡尼曼
1985 哈拉尔德·克拉默之死 H·克拉默
1987 安德烈·尼古拉耶维奇·科尔莫哥洛夫之死 安·科尔莫戈罗夫
1987 将基于核函数的回归应用于聚焦相机（“模糊系统”） 山川
1989 LJ Cohen对统计模型和方法的批判， LJ 科恩
1990 观测数据的样条模型 G. 瓦赫巴
1992 马丁格尔方法在医学研究中的全面发展 O.艾伦、E.安德森、R.吉尔
1995 弗洛伦斯·南丁格尔之死 大卫 FN David
1997 将科克伦方法扩展到序贯分析 C. 詹尼森，B.W. 特恩布尔
1999 EM算法适用于涉及Aalen-Anderson-Gill鞅模型的问题 RA Betensky、JC Lindsey、LM Ryan
2000 约翰·图基之死 J. 'Tukey

参考书目

BIBLIOGRAPHY

适合没有数学基础的读者阅读的书籍和文章：

Books and articles that are accessible to readers without mathematical training:

詹姆斯·R·博恩和道格拉斯·A·扎恩著，1994年。《统计咨询的人性一面》。加利福尼亚州贝尔蒙特：终身学习出版社。博恩和扎恩总结了他们作为大学（博恩）和工业界（扎恩）科学家统计顾问的共同经验。本书面向刚入行的统计学家，但主要探讨的是合作科学家之间的心理关系。书中的洞见和案例使读者能够真切地感受到咨询统计学家的工作内容。

BOEN, JAMES R., and Zahn, Douglas A. 1994. The Human Side of Statistical Consulting. Belmont, CA: Lifetime Learning Publications. Boen and Zahn sum up their combined experiences as statistical consultants to scientists at a university (Boen) and in industry (Zahn). The book was written for statisticians entering the profession, but it is primarily a book about the psychological relationships among collaborating scientists. The insights and the examples used provide the reader with a very real feel for what the work of a consulting statistician is all about.

乔治·博克斯 (George Box) 1976 年发表的《科学与统计学》(Science and statistics)，刊登于《美国统计协会杂志》(Journal of the American Statistical Association)第 71 卷，第 791 页。这是乔治·博克斯的一篇演讲，他在演讲中阐述了他自己的实验和科学推断理念。大部分内容即使没有数学基础的读者也能理解。

BOX, GEORGE E. P. 1976. Science and statistics. Journal of the American Statistical Association 71:791. This is an address by George Box, in which he lays out his own philosophy of experimentation and scientific inference. Most of the material is accessible to readers without mathematical training.

琼·费舍尔·博克斯 (Joan Fisher Box, JOAN FISHER)。1978。《R.A.费舍尔：一位科学家的一生》(R.A. Fisher, the Life of a Scientist)。纽约：约翰·威利父子出版社。琼·费舍尔·博克斯是R.A.费舍尔的女儿。在这部父亲传记中，她出色地阐释了父亲诸多研究的性质和重要性。她还展现了父亲作为一个人的人格魅力，并穿插了一些个人回忆。她并没有回避父亲行为中那些不太光彩的方面（例如他抛弃家庭的​​那段时期），而是展现了对父亲动机和思想的理解。

BOX, JOAN FISHER. 1978. R. A. Fisher, the Life of a Scientist. New York: John Wiley & Sons. Joan Fisher Box is R. A. Fisher’s daughter. In this biography of her father, she does an excellent job of explaining the nature and importance of much of his research. She also provides a view of him as a man, including personal reminiscences. She does not gloss over the less admirable aspects of his behavior (such as the time he abandoned his family) but shows an understanding of his motives and ideas.

戴明，W. 爱德华兹。1982。《走出危机》。马萨诸塞州剑桥：麻省理工学院高级工程研究中心。这是戴明精心撰写的一部旨在影响美国企业管理的著作。他没有使用数学符号，而是解释了诸如操作定义和变异来源等重要概念。他列举了不同行业的实例。最重要的是，这本书是这位杰出人物思想的延伸；它的行文风格与他的演讲如出一辙。他对管理以及他认为美国企业和政府管理实践中许多愚蠢之处都毫不留情地进行了批判。

DEMING, W. EDWARDS. 1982. Out of the Crisis. Cambridge, MA: Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Center for Advanced Engineering Study. This is Deming’s carefully written attempt to influence management of American companies. Without using mathematical notation, he explains important ideas like operational definition and sources of variance. He gives examples of situations in different industries. Above all, the book is an extension of this remarkable man; it reads exactly as he talked. He does not hold back on his criticism of management or of many of what he considered to be foolish aspects of American management practices, both in industry and government.

EFRON, BRADLEY. 1984. 从经验中学习的艺术。《科学》 225:156。这篇短文解释了“自助法”和其他计算机密集型重采样方法的发展，作者正是自助法的发明者。

EFRON, BRADLEY. 1984. The art of learning from experience. Science 225:156. This short article explains the development of “the bootstrap” and other forms of computer-intensive resampling, written by the man who invented the bootstrap.

费舍尔，RA 1956。《统计方法与科学推断》。爱丁堡：奥利弗和博伊德出版社。尽管本书后几章包含一些数学推导，但它是费舍尔试图用严谨的文字阐释他对科学推断的理解。本书是他对耶日·内曼著作的回应。书中许多内容此前已发表于他的文章中，但本书是这位奠定现代数理统计学基础的天才对其所有观点的总结。

FISHER, R. A. 1956. Statistical Methods and Scientific Inference. Edinburgh: Oliver and Boyd. While it contains some mathematical derivations in its later chapters, this book was Fisher’s attempt to explain what he meant by scientific inference, in carefully written words. It is his answer to work by Jerzy Neyman. Much of the material in this book appeared in earlier articles, but this is a summing up, by the genius who laid the foundations of modern mathematical statistics, of his views on what it all means.

胡克，R. 1983。《如何辨别说谎者和统计学家》。纽约：马塞尔·德克尔出版社。统计学家们对科普期刊中统计方法的滥用感到不安，因此他们时常尝试向非统计学家解释良好统计实践的概念和步骤。然而，据我观察，这些书籍的主要读者是统计学家，而真正面向大众的读者却往往被忽视。本书是此类书籍中的佼佼者。

HOOKE, R. 1983. How to Tell the Liars From the Statisticians. New York: Marcel Dekker. From time to time, statisticians, disturbed by the misuse of statistical methods in popular journals, have attempted to explain the concepts and procedures of good statistical practice to nonstatisticians. Unfortunately, it has been my observation that these books are read primarily by statisticians and are ignored by the people at whom they are aimed. This is one of the best of these books.

科茨，塞缪尔。1965。《统计术语——俄语与英语——以苏联统计学发展为例》。《美国统计学家》 19:22。科茨是最早研究俄罗斯学派著作的英语统计学家之一。他学习俄语，成为该学派著作的主要译者。在本文中，他描述了俄语词汇在数学论文中的使用特点。文章还详细描述了统计方法论在共产主义正统思想面前的命运。

KOTZ, SAMUEL. 1965. Statistical terminology-Russian vs. English—in the light of the development of statistics in the U.S.S.R. American Statistician 19:22. Kotz was one of the first English-speaking statisticians to examine the work of the Russian school. He learned Russian to become a major translator of that work. In this article, he describes the peculiarities of Russian words as they are used in mathematical articles. The article also contains a detailed description of the fate of statistical methodology in the face of communist orthodoxy.

曼恩，南希·R. 1987。《卓越之钥——戴明哲学的故事》。洛杉矶，加利福尼亚州：普雷斯威克出版社。南希·曼恩曾担任多家西海岸工业公司数学服务部门的负责人，后成为加州大学洛杉矶分校的教员，目前经营一家小型咨询公司。她对数理统计发展的贡献包括一些极其巧妙的方法，用于估计设备寿命测试中一类复杂分布的参数。她与W·爱德华兹·戴明关系密切，是他的好友之一。本书是她为非数学专业人士阐释戴明的工作和方法。

MANN, NANCY R. 1987. The Keys to Excellence—The Story of the Deming Philosophy. Los Angeles, CA: Preswick Books. Nancy Mann was head of the mathematical services groups at several West Coast industrial firms, became a member of the faculty at University of California, Los Angeles, and now heads a small consulting firm. Her contributions to the development of mathematical statistics include some extremely clever methods for estimating the parameters of a complicated class of distributions that are used in life testing of equipment. She had a great deal of contact with W. Edwards Deming and was one of his good friends. This is her explanation of Deming’s work and methods for the nonmathematician.

皮尔逊，卡尔。1911。《科学语法》。纽约子午线图书馆：子午线图书馆版（1957）。尽管皮尔逊使用的一些例子如今已过时，被新的科学发现所取代，但本书中蕴含的真知灼见和精辟的哲学论述，使其在近百年后的今天读来依然令人愉悦。本书为读者展现了皮尔逊的写作风格和思想脉络。

PEARSON, KARL. 1911. The Grammar of Science. Meridian Library, NY: Meridian Library Edition (1957). Although some of the examples Pearson used are now outdated, having been superseded by new scientific discoveries, the insights and the bits of well-written philosophy in this book make it a delight to read almost 100 years later. It provides the reader with an excellent example of Pearson’s style of writing and thought.

RAO, CR 1989. 《统计与真理：运用偶然性》。马里兰州费尔兰：国际合作出版社。C. 拉达克里希纳·拉奥是统计学界备受尊敬的人物之一。在他的祖国印度，他被授予尼赫鲁杰出教授称号，并被多所印度大学授予荣誉博士学位。他曾荣获美国统计协会威尔克斯奖章，并被四大统计学会授予会士称号。他发表的著作大多涉及极其复杂的多维推导，而本书则是他一系列在印度举办的科普讲座的成果。书中阐述了他对统计建模的价值、目的和哲学理念的深思熟虑。

RAO, C. R. 1989. Statistics and Truth: Putting Chance to Work. Fairland, MD: International Co-Operative Publishing House. C. Radhakrishna Rao is one of the more honored members of the statistical profession. In his native land, he has been named Nehru Distinguished Professor and has been granted honorary doctorates from several Indian universities. A recipient of the American Statistical Association’s Wilks Medal, he has been named a fellow of each of the four major statistical societies. Much of his published work involves extremely complicated derivations in multidimensions, but this book is the result of a series of popular lectures he gave in India. It presents his carefully thought-out concepts of the value, purpose, and philosophical ideas behind statistical modeling.

朱迪思·M·坦努尔（Judith M. Tanur）主编，1972年。《统计学：未知领域的指南》。旧金山：霍尔登-戴出版社。过去二十年来，美国统计协会一直致力于面向高中生和大学本科生开展统计教育项目。该协会的各个委员会编写了教学材料，并赞助制作了录像带，其中一些曾在公共电视台播出。本书由一系列案例研究组成，探讨了如何将统计方法应用于重要的社会或医学问题。这些案例研究由参与其中的统计学家撰写，但其语言通俗易懂，即使是几乎没有数学基础的高中生也能轻松阅读和理解。本书共收录45篇文章，每篇约10页。作者中包括我在本书中提到的一些人物。书中探讨的问题包括：人们能否延缓死亡？以及增加警力是否能降低犯罪率？其他主题包括对势均力敌的选举的讨论、对《联邦党人文集》的分析的简要描述、新食品的评价方法、消费者价格指数、预测未来人口增长、人工降雨实验以及防空炮火的瞄准。

TANUR, JUDITH M., ed. 1972. Statistics: A Guide to the Unknown. San Francisco: Holden-Day, Inc. For the past twenty years, the American Statistical Association has had a program reaching out to high school students and college undergraduates. Committees of the association have prepared teaching materials, and the association has sponsored video tapes, several of which have appeared on public television. This book consists of a group of case studies, where statistical methods were applied to important social or medical problems. The case studies are written by statisticians who participated in them, but they are written to be read and understood by a high school student with little or no mathematics background. There are forty-five essays in this book, each running about ten pages long. The authors include some of the people I have mentioned in this book. Some of the questions attacked are: Can people postpone their deaths? and Does an increase in police manpower decrease the incidence of crime? Other topics include a discussion of close elections, a brief description of the analysis of the Federalist papers, how new food products are evaluated, the consumer price index, predicting future population growth, cloud seeding experiments, and the aiming of antiaircraft fire.

约翰·W·图基 (John W. Tukey) 著，《探索性数据分析》(Exploratory Data Analysis)，1977 年。马萨诸塞州雷丁：艾迪生-韦斯利出版社。这是图基为普林斯顿大学一年级统计学学生编写的教科书。本书假定读者没有任何先验知识——甚至不需要高中代数基础。它从面对数据集的人的角度出发，探讨统计推理。

TUKEY, JOHN W. 1977. Exploratory Data Analysis. Reading, MA: Addison-Wesley Publishing Company. This is the textbook Tukey wrote for first-year statistics students at Princeton University. It assumes no prior knowledge—not even of high school algebra. It approaches statistical reasoning from the standpoint of a person faced with a set of data.

著名统计学家的著作集：

Collected works of prominent statisticians:

BOX, GEORGE EP 1985. The Collected Works of George EP Box. Belmont, CA: Wadsworth Publishing Company.

BOX, GEORGE E. P. 1985. The Collected Works of George E. P. Box. Belmont, CA: Wadsworth Publishing Company.

COCHRAN, W G. 1982.统计学贡献。纽约：John Wiley & Sons出版社。

COCHRAN, W G. 1982. Contributions to Statistics. New York: John Wiley & Sons.

FIENBERG, SE, Hoaglin, DC, Kruskal, WH 和 Tanur, JM 编. 1990.统计模型：弗雷德里克·莫斯特勒对统计学、科学和公共政策的贡献。纽约：施普林格出版社。

FIENBERG, S. E., Hoaglin, D. C., Kruskal, W. H., and Tanur, J. M., eds. 1990. A Statistical Model: Frederick Mosteller’s Contributions to Statistics, Science, and Public Policy. New York: Springer-Verlag.

FISHER, RA 1971. RA Fisher论文集。JH Bennett编辑。阿德莱德：阿德莱德大学。

FISHER, R. A. 1971. Collected Papers of R. A. Fisher. Edited by J. H. Bennett. Adelaide: The University of Adelaide.

——RA 1950. 《数理统计学贡献》。纽约：约翰·威利父子出版社。

——R. A. 1950. Contributions to Mathematical Statistics. New York: John Wiley & Sons.

戈塞特，威廉·西利。1942。“学生”论文集。由E.S.皮尔逊和约翰·威沙特编辑。剑桥：剑桥大学出版社。

GOSSET, WILLIAM SEALY. 1942. “Student” ’s Collected Papers. Edited by E. S. Pearson and John Wishart. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press.

NEYMAN, JERZY. 1967. J. Neyman早期统计论文选集。加州伯克利：加州大学出版社。

NEYMAN, JERZY. 1967. A Selection of Early Statistical Papers of J. Neyman. Berkeley, CA: University of California Press.

NEYMAN, J. 和 Kiefer, J. 1985.纪念 Jerry Neyman 和 Jack Kiefer 的伯克利会议论文集。由 Lucien M. Le Cam 和 RA Olshen 编辑。加利福尼亚州蒙特雷：Wadsworth Advanced Books。

NEYMAN, J., and Kiefer, J. 1985. Proceedings of the Berkeley Conference in Honor of Jerry Neyman and Jack Kiefer. Edited by Lucien M. Le Cam and R. A. Olshen. Monterey, CA: Wadsworth Advanced Books.

SAVAGE, LJ 1981. Leonard Jimmie Savage 的著作——纪念选集。华盛顿特区：美国统计协会和数理统计学会。

SAVAGE, L. J. 1981. The Writings of Leonard Jimmie Savage—A Memorial Selection. Washington, DC: The American Statistical Association and the Institute of Mathematical Statistics.

TUKEY, JW 1984. 《约翰·W·图基作品集》。由WS Cleveland编辑。贝尔蒙特，加利福尼亚州：沃兹沃思高级图书公司。

TUKEY, J. W. 1984. The Collected Works of John W Tukey. Edited by W. S. Cleveland. Belmont, CA: Wadsworth Advanced Books.

讣告、回忆录和已发表的对话

Obituaries, reminiscences, and published conversations

亚历山大，肯尼斯·S. 1996。与泰德·哈里斯的对话。《统计科学》 11:150。

ALEXANDER, KENNETH S. 1996. A conversation with Ted Harris. Statistical Science 11:150.

ANDERSON, RL 1980. William Gemmell Cochran, 1909-1980: A personal Tribute. Biometrics 36:574.

ANDERSON, R. L. 1980. William Gemmell Cochran, 1909-1980: A personal Tribute. Biometrics 36:574.

ANDERSON, TW 1996. RA Fisher 和多元分析。统计科学11:20。

ANDERSON, T. W. 1996. R. A. Fisher and multivariate analysis. Statistical Science 11:20.

安德烈·尼古拉耶维奇·科尔莫哥洛夫：1903-1987。IMS 公告16:324。

ANDREI NIKOLAEVICH KOLMOGOROV: 1903-1987. IMS Bulletin 16:324.

安斯康姆，弗朗西斯·J.（主持人）。1988 年。弗雷德里克·莫斯特勒和约翰·W·图基：一次对话。《统计科学》 3:136。

ANSCOMBE, FRANCIS J., moderator. 1988. Frederick Mosteller and John W. Tukey: A conversation. Statistical Science 3:136.

阿米蒂奇，彼得。1997。《生物识别学会——50 年回顾》。生物识别学会通讯， 3。

ARMITAGE, PETER. 1997. The Biometric Society—50 years on. Biometric Society Newsletter, 3.

———. 1977. 向奥斯汀·布拉德福德·希尔致敬。皇家统计学会杂志， A辑 140:127。

———. 1977. A tribute to Austin Bradford Hill. Journal of the Royal Statistical Society, Series A 140:127.

BANKS, DAVID L. 1996. 与 IJ Good 的对话。统计科学11:1。

BANKS, DAVID L. 1996. A conversation with I. J. Good. Statistical Science 11:1.

BARNARD, GA 和 Godambe, VP 1982。纪念文章，Allan Birnbaum，1923-1976。统计年鉴10：1033。

BARNARD, G. A., and Godambe, V. P. 1982. Memorial article, Allan Birnbaum, 1923-1976. The Annals of Statistics 10:1033.

布洛姆，古纳尔。 1987。哈拉尔德·克拉默，1893-1985。统计年鉴15：1335。

BLOM, GUNNAR. 1987. Harald Cramér, 1893-1985. Annals of Statistics 15:1335.

BOARDMAN, THOMAS J. 1994. 改变世界的统计学家：W. Edwards Deming，1900-1993。美国统计学家48:179。

孟德尔，格雷戈尔。1993。《格雷戈尔·孟德尔的植物杂交实验：指导性研究》，阿兰·F·科尔科斯和弗洛伊德·V·莫纳汉编辑。新泽西州新不伦瑞克：罗格斯大学出版社。

MENDEL, GREGOR. 1993. Gregor Mendel’s Experiments on Plant Hybrids: A Guided Study, edited by Alain F. Corcos and Floyd V. Monaghan. New Brunswick, NJ: Rutgers University Press. P

EARSON, KARL. 1935.论犹太人与非犹太人的关系。生物统计学220:32。

EARSON, KARL. 1935. On Jewish-Gentile relationships. Biometrika 220:32.

SALSBURG, DS 1992.临床试验中限制性显著性检验的应用。纽约：Springer-Verlag。

SALSBURG, D. S. 1992. The Use of Restricted Significance Tests in Clinical Trials. New York: Springer-Verlag.

SAVAGE, LJ 1954.统计学基础。纽约：John Wiley & Sons出版社。

SAVAGE, L. J. 1954. The Foundations of Statistics. New York: John Wiley & Sons.

注释

Notas

[1]它有时被称为高斯分布，以纪念人们一度认为第一个提出该分布的人，但实际上并非卡尔·弗里德里希·高斯，而是更早的数学家亚伯拉罕·棣莫弗首先写下了该分布的公式。有充分的理由相信丹尼尔·伯努利在此之前就已经发现了这个公式。所有这些都印证了当代科学史学家斯蒂芬·斯蒂格勒所说的“命名不公定律”，即数学中没有任何事物是以发现者的名字命名的。

[1] It is sometimes called the Gaussian distribution, in honor of the man once believed to have first formulated it, except that it was not Carl Friedrich Gauss but an earlier mathematician named Abraham de Moivre who first wrote down the formula for the distribution. There is good reason to believe Daniel Bernoulli came across the formula before this. All of this is an example of what Stephen Stigler, a contemporary historian of science, calls the law of misonomy. that nothing in mathematics is ever named after the person who discovered it. <<

[2]克伦威尔独裁统治结束后，君主制复辟。英国内战两派达成停战协议，新统治者不得起诉任何在世的克伦威尔追随者。然而，停战协议并未涉及死者。因此，克伦威尔和两名下令处决查理一世的法官的尸体被挖出，并以弑君罪受审。他们被判有罪，头颅被砍下，插在威斯敏斯特教堂上方的长矛上示众。这三颗头颅在那里放置多年，最终消失无踪。一颗据称是克伦威尔的头颅出现在伦敦的一家“博物馆”中。皮尔逊正是研究了这颗头颅。他得出结论，这的确是奥利弗·克伦威尔的头颅。

[2] After the restoration of the monarchy, following Cromwell’s dictatorship, a truce between the two factions in the civil war in England meant that the new rulers could not prosecute any of the living followers of Cromwell. However, there was nothing in the truce about the dead. So the bodies of Cromwell and two of the judges who had ordered the execution of Charles I were dug up and tried for the crime of regicide. They were convicted, and their heads were chopped off and placed on pikes above westminster Abbey. The three heads were left there for years and eventually disappeared. A head, supposedly that of Cromwell, showed up in a “museum” in London. It was that head which Pearson examined. He concluded that it was, indeed, the head of Oliver Cromwell. <<

[3]根据斯蒂格勒的不均衡定律，泊松分布以十八、十九世纪数学家西蒙·德尼·泊松的名字命名，但以他名字命名的分布其实更早由伯努利家族的一位成员描述过。

[3] Following Stigler’s law of misonomy, the Poisson distribution is named after the eighteenth-nineteenth-century mathematician Siméon Denis Poisson, but the distribution named after him was described earlier by one of the Bernoullis. <<

[4]这可以被视为斯蒂格勒不均衡定律的一个推论。戈塞特用字母“z”来表示这个比率。几年后，教科书作者们形成了用字母“z”来指代正态分布变量的惯例，并开始用字母“t”来表示“学生”比率。

[4] This is an example of what might be considered a corollary of Stigler’s law of misonomy. Gosset used the letter “z” to indicate this ratio. Some years later, writers of textbooks developed the tradition of referring to normally distributed variables with the letter “z,” and they began using the letter “t” for “Student”’s ratio. <<

[5]在英国剑桥大学等高校，每位学生都有一位被称为学生导师的教员，负责指导学生完成相应的课程作业。

[5] It is the practice at British universities like Cambridge for each student to have a faculty member, called the student’s tutor, who guides the student through the appropriate course work. <<

[6]厌学现象不仅限于数学领域。在英国，像哈罗公学这样最顶尖的私立中学被称为“公立学校” 。

[6] Misonomy extends beyond mathematics. In England, the most exclusive private secondary schools, like Harrow, are called “public schools.” <<

[7]格雷戈尔·孟德尔是一位中欧僧侣（他的真名是约翰——又一个名字拼写错误），他在19世纪60年代发表了一系列文章，描述了豌豆育种实验。由于他的研究成果不符合当时植物学研究的普遍模式，因此一度被埋没。后来，在威廉·贝特森的领导下，剑桥大学的一群生物学家重新发现了他的研究成果。贝特森在剑桥大学建立了遗传学系。卡尔·皮尔逊似乎乐于参与众多争论，其中之一便是他对这些遗传学家的工作嗤之以鼻。这些遗传学家研究的是生物体中微小的离散变化，而皮尔逊则认为参数的大规模连续变化才是进化的真正本质。费舍尔的一篇早期论文表明，皮尔逊的公式可以从贝特森研究的微小离散变化中推导出来。皮尔逊看到这一结论后评论说，这显而易见，费舍尔应该把论文寄给贝特森，让他亲眼见证真相。贝特森的评论是，费舍尔应该把这份文件寄给皮尔逊，让他看清真相。最终，费舍尔接替贝特森，成为剑桥大学遗传学系主任。

[7] Gregor Mendel was a Central European monk (whose real first name was Johann—more misonomy) who in the 1860s published a set of articles describing experiments on the breeding of peas. His work fell into obscurity, since it did not fit the general pattern of botanical work then being published. It was rediscovered by a group of biologists at Cambridge University under the leadership of William Bateson, who established a department of genetics at Cambridge. One of the many controversies that Karl Pearson seemed to enjoy consisted of his disdain for the work of these geneticists, who examined minute discrete changes in living organisms, whereas Pearson was interested in grand continuous modification of parameters as the true nature of evolution. One of Fisher’s first papers showed that Pearson’s formulas could be derived from Bateson’s minute discrete changes. Pearson’s comments on seeing this were that it was obvious and that Fisher should send the paper to Bateson to show Bateson the truth. Bateson’s comments were that Fisher should send it to Pearson to show Pearson the truth. Eventually, Fisher succeeded Bateson as chairman of the Department of Genetics at Cambridge. <<

[8] 1966年冈贝尔去世后，他的文稿被移交给纽约的利奥·贝克研究所。该研究所近期公布了八卷缩微胶片，内容涉及冈贝尔的反纳粹活动，这些胶片被整理成书，名为《埃米尔·J·冈贝尔文集：一位反纳粹学者在魏玛和流亡时期的政治文稿 》 。

[8] On his death in 1966, Gumbel’s papers were given to the Leo Baeck Institute of New York, which recently released eight reels of microfilm dealing with his activities against the Nazis, organized under the title The Emil J. Gumbel Collection, Political Papers of an Anti-Nazi Scholar in Weimar and Exile. <<

[9] 20世纪50年代，印度的C.R. Rao和在霍华德大学任教的David Blackwell证明，即使Fisher正则性条件不成立，仍然可以从最大似然估计（MLE）中构造出最有效统计量。这两位学者独立地得出了相同的定理，因此，作为Stigler不均衡定律的一个例外，Rao-Blackwell定理确实以其发现者的名字命名。

[9] In the 1950s, C. R. Rao from India and David Blackwell, teaching at Howard University, showed that, if Fisher’s regularity conditions do not hold, it is still possible to construct a most efficient statistic from the MLE. The two men, working independently, produced the same theorem and so, in an exception to Stigler’s law of misonomy, the Rao-Blackwell theorem does honor its discoverers. <<

[10]斯蒂格勒的不均衡定律在概率单位分析中发挥着作用。布利斯显然是第一个提出这种分析方法的人。然而，该方法需要在一个复杂的表格中进行两阶段迭代计算和插值。1953年，美国氰胺公司的弗兰克·威尔科克森制作了一组图表，用户只需将尺子放在一组标记线上即可计算概率单位。这项研究成果发表在J.T.利奇菲尔德和威尔科克森的论文中。为了证明这种图形解决方案能够得出正确答案，作者在附录中重复了布利斯和费舍尔提出的公式。20世纪60年代末的某个时候，一位不知名的药理学家将这篇论文交给了一位不知名的程序员，后者利用附录编写了一个计算机程序来运行概率单位分析（通过布利斯的迭代解决方案）。该程序的文档以利奇菲尔德和威尔科克森的论文为参考。其他公司和大学药理学系很快也出现了其他概率单位分析计算机程序，这些程序都源自最初的程序，并且都在文档中引用了利奇菲尔德和威尔科克森的论文。最终，通过这些程序运行的概率单位分析开始出现在药理学和毒理学文献中，而利奇菲尔德和威尔科克森的论文则被用作概率单位分析的“来源”。因此，在科学引文索引（SCI）中，利奇菲尔德和威尔科克森的这篇论文已成为历史上被引用次数最多的论文之一——这并非因为利奇菲尔德和威尔科克森做出了多么伟大的贡献，而是因为布利斯的概率单位分析已被证明非常有用。

[10] Stigler’s law of misonomy plays a role in probit analysis. Bliss was apparently the first to propose this method of analysis. However, the method required a two-stage iterative calculation and interpolation in a complicated table. In 1953, Frank Wilcoxon at American Cyanamid produced a set of graphs that enabled the user to compute the probit by just laying a ruler across a set of marked lines. This was published in a paper by J. T. Litchfield and Wilcoxon. To prove that this graphical solution produced the correct answer, the authors included an appendix in which they repeated the formulas proposed by Bliss and Fisher. Sometime in the late 1960s, an unknown pharmacologist gave that paper to an unknown programmer, who used the appendix to write a computer program that ran the probit analysis (via Bliss’s iterative solution). The documentation of that program used the Litchfield and Wilcoxon paper as its reference. Other probit analysis computer programs soon began appearing at other companies and in academic pharmacology departments, all derived from this original program and all using the Litchfield and Wilcoxon paper as their reference in the documentation. Eventually, the probit analyses run via these programs began to appear in the pharmacological and toxicological literature, and the Litchfield and Wilcoxon paper was used in the references as the “source” of probit analysis. Thus, in the Science Citation Index, which tabulates all the references used in most published scientific papers, this paper by Litchfield and Wilcoxon has become one of the most frequently cited in history—not because Litchfield and Wilcoxon did something so great but because Bliss’s probit analysis has proved to be so very useful. <<

[11]此处使用的混沌理论描述取自布莱恩·戴维斯的《探索混沌：理论与实验》（马萨诸塞州雷丁：珀尔修斯出版社，1999年）。

[11] The descriptions of chaos theory used here are taken from Brian Davies, Exploring Chaos: Theory and Experiment (Reading, MA: Perseus Books, 1999). <<

[12]在本章中，我将基本的数学思想归功于内曼。这是因为内曼负责最终完善的公式表述及其背后严谨的数学推导。然而，埃贡·皮尔逊与威廉·西利·戈塞特之间的通信（始于皮尔逊与内曼相识前六个月）表明，皮尔逊当时已经在思考其他假设和不同类型的误差，而戈塞特可能才是最初提出这一想法的人。尽管皮尔逊是最初的贡献者，但他承认内曼为他自己的“零散想法”提供了数学基础。

[12] Throughout this chapter, I attribute the essential mathematical ideas to Neyman. This is because Neyman was responsible for the polished final formulation and for the careful mathematical development behind it. However, correspondence between Egon Pearson and William Sealy Gosset, which began six months before Pearson met Neyman, indicates that Pearson was already thinking about alternative hypotheses and different types of errors and that Gosset may have first suggested the idea. In spite of the fact that his was the initial input, Pearson acknowledged that Neyman provided the mathematical foundations for his own “loose ideas.” <<

[13]凯恩斯的身份认同存在一种误解。大多数人会认为他是一位经济学家，凯恩斯主义经济学派的创始人，研究政府如何通过货币政策操纵经济运行。然而，凯恩斯拥有哲学博士学位；他的博士论文《概率论》（1921年出版）是数理统计哲学基础发展史上的一座重要丰碑。在后续章节中，我们将有机会引用凯恩斯的著作。我们将引用的是作为概率论者的凯恩斯，而非作为经济学家的凯恩斯。

[13] There is a kind of misonomy involved with Keynes. Most people Would think of him as an economist, the founder of the Keynesian school of economics, dealing with the ways in which government manipulation of monetary policy can influence the course of the economy. However, Keynes had his Ph.D. in philosophy; and his Ph.D. dissertation, published in 1921 as A Treatise on Probability, is a major monument in the development of the philosophical foundations behind the use of mathematical statistics. In future chapters, we will have occasion to quote Keynes. It will be from Keynes the probabilist, and not Keynes the economist, that we will be quoting. <<

[14]流行病学是统计学的一个相关领域，它利用统计模型来研究人类健康的模式。最简单的流行病学形式是提供生命统计数据的表格以及对其分布参数的简单估计。更复杂的流行病学形式则利用高级统计学理论来研究和预测流行病的演变过程。

[14] Epidemiology is an allied field of statistics in which statistical models are used to examine patterns of human health. In its simplest form, epidemiology provides tabulations of vital statistics along with simple estimates of the parameters of their distributions. In its more complicated forms, epidemiology makes use of advanced theories of statistics to examine and predict the course of epidemic diseases. <<

[15]斯蒂格勒的“不均衡定律”在这个名字中得到了充分体现。贝叶斯远非第一个注意到条件概率对称性的人。伯努利兄弟似乎早就意识到了这一点。棣莫弗也曾提及过。然而，贝叶斯却独揽了功劳（或者，考虑到贝叶斯不愿发表，我们或许可以说贝叶斯应该为此负责）。

[15] Stigler’s law of misonomy comes into full bloom with this name. Bayes was far from being the first person to note the symmetry of conditional probability. The Bernoullis seem to have been aware of it. de Moivre makes reference to it. However, Bayes alone gets the credit (or, given Bayes’s reluctance to publish, we might say Bayes gets the blame). <<

[16]事实上，只有麦迪逊本人提出了这一主张。这是对一份据称由汉密尔顿撰写、并在他去世三年后由其朋友公布的文件清单的回应。

[16] Actually, only Madison made the claim for himself. This was in response to a list of papers purported to have been written by Hamilton and released by his friends three years after his death. <<

[17]请记住，“Student”是William S. Gosset的笔名，他开发了第一个小样本统计检验方法。

[17] Recall that “Student” was the pseudonym of William S. Gosset, who developed the first small-sample statistical tests. <<

[18]事实上，作为斯蒂格勒不均衡定律的进一步佐证，威尔科克森并非第一个提出非参数方法的人。卡尔·皮尔逊在1914年的工作似乎已经暗示了其中一些想法。然而，直到威尔科克森在该领域的工作，非参数方法才被充分理解为一场彻底的革命。

[18] Actually, as further justification of Stigler’s law of misonomy, Wilcoxon was not the first to suggest nonparametric methods. Work by Karl Pearson in 1914 seems to suggest some of these ideas. However, the nonparametric approach was not fully understood to be such a drastic revolution until Wilcoxon’s work in this field. <<

[19]在美国，每十年一次的人口普查旨在统计特定日期内的所有人口。然而，对1970年人口普查及后续普查的调查显示，全面统计往往会遗漏许多人，并重复计算其他人。此外，被遗漏的人通常来自特定的社会经济群体，因此不能假定他们与已被统计的公民“相似”。甚至可以说，即使就美国而言，也没有人能够确切地知道特定日期有多少人。

[19] In the United States, an attempt is made to count all the people on a given day for the decennial census. However, investigations of the 1970 census and those that followed showed that the complete count tended to miss many people and double-count others. Furthermore, she missing persons are usually from specific socioeconomic groups, so it cannot be assumed that they are “similar” to citizens who were counted. It might also be said, even of the United States, that no one will ever know exactly how many people there are on a given day. <<

[20] 20世纪60年代末，我参加了一场路易斯·比恩主讲的会议。他讲述了早年他和盖洛普公司如何利用民意调查为政治候选人提供建议。盖洛普公司后来开设了专栏，名为“盖洛普民意调查”（Gallup Poll），并开始公开发表民意调查。比恩则继续进行私人民意调查，但他警告盖洛普公司，他可能会开设自己的专栏，并将其命名为“飞奔的比恩民意调查”（Galloping Bean Poll）。

[20] In the late 1960s, I attended a session where Louis Bean was a speaker. He described those early years, when he and Gallup began using surveys to advise political candidates. Gallup went public with a syndicated column, the Gallup Poll. Bean continued to do private polling, but he warned Gallup that he might set up his own column and call it the Galloping Bean Poll. <<

[21]注意这种抽象性。“I”当然表示“真”，“F”表示“假”。通过使用看似无意义的符号，数学家们能够构思出各种变体。例如，假设我们提出三个真值：“T”、“F”和“M”（表示“可能”）。这会对数学产生什么影响？纯粹抽象符号的使用在符号逻辑中产生了引人入胜的复杂性，并且在过去九十年中，该领域一直是数学研究的活跃领域。

[21] Note the abstract nature of this. “‘I’,” of course, means “True,” and “F” means “False.” By using apparently meaningless symbols, the mathematicians are able to think of variations on the ideas. Suppose, for instance, we proposed three truth values: “T,” “F,” and “M” (for “Maybe”). What does this do to the mathematics? The use of purely abstract symbols has led to fascinating complexities in symbolic logic, and the subject has remained an active area of mathematical research for the past ninety years. <<

[22]在20世纪80年代联邦法院审理的马德尔诉塞尔案（Marder v. GD Searle）中，原告声称她的疾病是由宫内节育器（IUD）引起的。作为证据，原告提供了流行病学证据，表明使用宫内节育器的女性患盆腔炎的频率明显增加。被告则提交了一份统计分析报告，计算了相对风险（使用宫内节育器患病的概率除以不使用宫内节育器患病的概率）的95%置信区间。置信区间在0.6到3.0之间。陪审团意见不一。法官最终裁定被告胜诉，并指出：“尤其重要的是，要确保因果关系的推断至少基于合理的因果概率。”这里存在一个未明言的假设，即概率可以定义为个人概率。尽管该意见试图区分“因果关系”和“统计相关性”，但由此产生的混淆，以及上级法院判决中也存在的混淆，凸显了因果概念中存在的根本矛盾，而罗素早在五十年前就讨论过这个问题。

[22] In the case of Marder v. G. D. Searle, which ran through the federal courts in the 1980s, the plaintiff claimed her illness resulted from her IUD. As proof, the plaintiff presented epidemiological evidence showing an apparent increase in frequency of pelvic inflammation among women who used IUDs. The defendant presented a statistical analysis that computed 95 percent confidence bounds on the relative risk (the probability of getting the disease with the IUD divided by the probability of getting the disease without the IUD). The confidence bounds ran from .6 to 3.0. The jury was deadlocked. The judge ruled in favor of the defendant, stating: “[It] is particularly important to be assured that an inference of causation is based upon at least a reasonable probability of causation.” There is an unstated assumption here that probability can be defined as personal probability. Although the opinion tried to distinguish between “causation” and “statistical correlation,” the confusion this involves, and that also occurs in the rulings of higher courts, points up the basic inconsistency involved in the concept of cause and effect, which Russell discussed fifty years before. <<

[23]该论文的共同作者包括美国国家癌症研究所 (NCI) 的 William Haenszel、美国癌症协会的 E. Cutler Hammond、约翰·霍普金斯大学公共卫生学院的 Abraham Lilienfeld、NCI 的 Michael Shimkin 以及斯隆-凯特琳癌症研究所的 Ernst Wynder。然而，该论文是由 Cornfield 提出并组织撰写的。特别是，Cornfield 撰写了仔细审查并反驳 Fisher 论点的章节。

[23] The coauthors were William Haenszel of the National Cancer Institute (NCI), E. Cutler Hammond of the American Cancer Society, Abraham Lilienfeld of the School of Hygiene and Public Health, Johns Hopkins University, Michael Shimkin of the NCI, and Ernst Wynder of the Sloan-Kettering Institute. However, the paper was proposed and organized by Cornfield. In particular, Cornfield wrote the sections that carefully examine and refute Fisher’s arguments. <<

[24]尽管费舍尔（R.A. Fisher）对希尔（Hill）和多尔（Doll）的工作进行了猛烈抨击，但这两位在将费舍尔的方法推广到医学研究方面都发挥了重要作用。希尔几乎凭借一己之力说服了英国医学界，只有遵循费舍尔实验设计原则的研究才能获得有用的信息。理查德·多尔（Richard Doll）后来成为牛津大学钦定医学教授，他的名字已成为将现代临床研究转化为统计模型的代名词。

[24] In spite of the fact that R. A. Fisher chose to savage the work of Hill and Doll in particular, both men were prominent in the extension of Fisher’s methods to medical research. Almost single-handedly, Hill convinced the British medical community that useful information can be gained only from studies that follow the principles of Fisher’s experimental design. The name of Richard Doll, later to become Regius Professor of Medicine at Oxford University, is synonymous with the conversion of modern clinical research to statistical models. <<

[25]亨利·卡弗（1890-1977）是数学统计学发展成为一门受人尊敬的学术学科的先驱者之一。从1921年到1941年，他担任密歇根大学十位博士生的论文导师，所有博士生的研究课题都与数学统计学相关。1930年，他创办了《数理统计年鉴》 （Annals of Mathematical Statistics），并于1938年协助创立了数理统计学会（Institute of Mathematical Statistics），这是一个赞助《数理统计年鉴》的学术组织。本书第20章将详细介绍《数理统计年鉴》发展成为一份备受推崇的期刊的过程。

[25] Henry Carver (1890-1977) was a lonely pioneer in the development of mathematical statistics as a respectable academic subject. From 1921 to 1941, he was the thesis adviser of ten doctoral candidates at the University of Michigan, all of whom were given topics in mathematical statistics. In 1930, he founded the journal Annals of Mathematical Statistics, and in 1938 he helped found the Institute of Mathematical Statistics, a scholarly Organization that sponsored the Annals. The development of the Annals into a highly regarded journal is described in chapter 20. <<

[26]该研究所还有一位名叫阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦的研究员。但他是一位物理学家，虽然他的成就比摩尔的“扫街”要复杂一些，但他的研究成果却因与“现实生活”的应用而蒙上了一层阴影。

[26] There was another fellow at the institute named Albert Einstein. But he was a physicist and while his accomplishments were a little more complicated than Moore’s “sweeping the streets,” his work was badly tainted with applications to “real life.” <<

[27]如今，几乎所有工业领域的质量控制部门都使用休哈特控制图来追踪产量波动。休哈特这个名字部分体现了斯蒂格勒的“不均衡法则”。休哈特控制图的实际数学公式似乎最早由科塞特（“学生”）提出，甚至可能出现在乔治·尤德尼·尤尔的早期教科书中。但沃尔特·休哈特展示了如何将这项技术应用于质量控制，并将其推广为一种有效的方法。

[27] Today, almost every quality control department in industry uses Shewhart charts to track the variations in output. The name Shewhart is a partial example of Stigler’s law of misonomy. The actual mathematical formulation of the Shewhart chart seems to have been first proposed by Cosset (“Student”) and may even be seen in an early textbook by George Udny Yule. But Walter Shewhart showed how to apply this technique to quality control and popularized it as an effective methodology. <<

[28] 20世纪80年代初，统计理论的快速发展导致《年鉴》分为两份期刊：《统计年鉴》和《概率年鉴》 。

[28] In the early 1980s, the rapid development of statistical theory caused the Annals to divide into two journals, the Annals of Statistics and the Annals of Probability. <<

[29]二战结束后不久，《皇家统计学会会刊》（Journal of the Royal Statistical Society）分为三份期刊，最初分别命名为JRSS A 系列、JRSS B 系列和 JRSS C 系列。C 系列最终更名为《应用统计学》（Applied Statistics）。皇家统计学会力求使A 系列专注于处理影响商业和政府的一般性问题。B系列则集中刊载数学统计学及其所有抽象概念。然而，《应用统计学》一直难以保持其应用性，每一期都有一些文章的“应用”相当牵强，似乎仅仅是为了证明又一个优美却抽象的数学理论的合理性。

[29] Soon after World War II, the Journal of the Royal Statistical Society split into three journals, initially named JRSS Series A, JRSS Series B, and JRSS Series C. Series C eventually was named Applied Statistics. The Royal Statistical Society tries to keep Series A to deal with general issues affecting business and government. Series B is where mathematical statistics, with all its abstractions, can be found. It has been a struggle to keep Applied Statistics applied, and each issue has articles whose “applications” are quite far-fetched and appear to be there only to justify the development of yet another gem of beautiful, but abstract, mathematics. <<

[30]阿斯克男装学校是哈伯戴舍斯公司（Haberdashers' Company，成立于1448年）创办的七所学校之一。哈伯戴舍斯公司是一家历史悠久的同业公会。该公司前任会长罗伯特·阿斯克于1689年去世，留下一笔遗产（至今仍由该公司管理）用于创办一所学校，招收二十名贫困哈伯戴舍斯家族的子弟。如今，这所学校已发展成为一所拥有1300名学生的非常成功的学校。学校与哈伯戴舍斯公司的联系通过其管理机构得以维系，该机构一半的成员，包括主席，都是该公司的成员。

[30] The Haberdashers’ Aske’s School is one of seven schools founded by the Haberdashers’ Company, an ancient livery company (incorporated in 1448). Robert Aske, Past Master of the Haberdashers’ Company, died in 1689, leaving a bequest (to this day managed by the company) for the founding of a school for twenty sons of poor Haberdashers. Today it is a highly successful school of 1,300 boys. The connection with the Haberdashers’ Company is retained through the governing body, of which half the members, including the chairman, are members of the company. <<

[31]数学著作的标题中存在一种反常的因素。最难的通常标题是“……导论”或“……的基本理论”。费勒的书更是难上加难，因为它是一本“导论”，而且仅仅是第一卷。

[31] There is a perverse element in the titles of mathematical texts. The most difficult are usually entitled Introduction to … or The Elementary Theory of . . . Feller’s book is doubly difficult, since it is an “introduction” and it is only volume I. <<

[32]数学符号，由一系列罗马字母和希腊字母、波浪线以及上下标组成，是数学中令非数学家（甚至一些数学家）望而生畏的一个方面。它实际上是一种在紧凑的空间内将复杂概念相互关联的便捷方式。阅读数学论文的“诀窍”在于认识到每个符号都有其含义，在符号出现时就了解其含义，然后相信自己“理解”了它的含义，并注意符号的运用方式。数学优雅的精髓在于构建一种组织结构极其简洁的符号体系，使读者能够立即理解其中的关系。这种优雅体现在耶日·内曼（Jerzy Neyman）的论文中。恐怕我的博士论文远称不上优雅。我使用符号体系只是为了确保数学模型的所有可能方面都被涵盖在内。我的下标有下标，上标也有下标，而且在某些情况下，下标的参数还是可变的。约翰·图基那天下午才第一次看到这个定理，却能凭记忆把这堆复杂的符号全部复现出来，这让我感到非常惊讶。（尽管我的符号混乱不堪，图基还是给了我一份工作。但我当时已经有三个孩子，还有一个即将出生，所以我接受了另一份薪水更高的工作。）

[32] Mathematical notation, consisting of an array of letters, both Roman and Greek, with squiggly lines, and superscripts and subscripts, is one aspect of mathematics that intimidates the nonmathematician (and often some mathematicians, too). It is really a convenient way to relate complicated ideas to each other in a compact space. The “trick” in reading a mathematical paper is to recognize that each symbol has some meaning, to know the meaning when it is introduced, but then to take it on faith that you “understand” its meaning, and to pay attention to the way in which the symbol is manipulated. The essence of mathematical elegance is to produce a notation of symbols that is so simply organized that the reader can understand the relationships immediately. This is the sort of elegance one finds in papers by Jerzy Neyman. My Ph.D. thesis, I fear, was far from elegant. I was using the notation to make sure that all possible aspects of the mathematical model were included. My subscripts had subscripts and my superscripts had subscripts, and, in some cases, the subscripts had variable arguments. I was astonished that John Tukey was able to reproduce this complicated mess of symbols completely out of his head, having seen the theorem for the first time that afternoon. (In spite of the messiness of my notation, Tukey did offer me a position. But I had three children and one on the way, and I accepted a higher-paying position elsewhere.) <<

[33]贝尔在20世纪40年代和50年代撰写了几本通俗数学著作。他的《数学家传》至今仍是18世纪和19世纪伟大数学家的经典传记参考书。他的《数字命理学》（本文引文出自该书）探讨了数字命理学，据他本人所述，是他的清洁女工将他引入了这个领域。

[33] Bell wrote several popular books on mathematics during the 1940s and 1950s. His Men of Mathematics is still the classic biographical reference for the great mathematicians of the eighteenth and nineteenth centuries. His Numerology, from which this quote was taken, deals with numerology, to which he was introduced, he writes, by his cleaning lady. <<

[34]一个经典的例子是波德定律。波德定律是基于经验观察得出的结论：行星与太阳距离的对数与太阳系行星数量之间存在线性关系。事实上，海王星的发现正是因为天文学家运用波德定律预测了另一颗行星的大致轨道，并在该轨道上发现了海王星。在木星和土星的探测器发现许多靠近行星的小卫星之前，观测到的木星卫星似乎都符合波德定律。波德定律仅仅是一个巧合吗？还是它揭示了行星与太阳之间关系中一些我们尚未理解的深刻奥秘？

[34] A classic example of this is Bode’s law. Bode’s law is the empirical observation that there is a linear relationship between the logarithm of the distance from the Sun and the number of the planets in our solar system. In fact, the planet Neptune was found because astronomers applied Bode’s law to predict the approximate orbit of another planet and found Neptune in that orbit. Until space probes of Jupiter and Saturn discovered many smaller moons close to the planets, the only observed satellites of Jupiter appeared to follow Bode’s law. Is Bode’s law a random coincidence? Or does it tell us something deep and not yet understood about the relationships between planets and the Sun? <<

[35]当相同的词语出现在统计分析中时，人们常常会混淆词语的日常含义和特定的数学含义。我刚开始在制药行业工作时，我的一项分析中包含一个传统的统计结果表，其中一行指的是数据中微小随机波动造成的不确定性。在传统的统计表中，这一行被称为“误差”。一位高管拒绝将这样的报告提交给美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）。他问道：“我们怎么能承认数据有误差呢？”他指的是为了确保临床数据的准确性，我们做了大量的努力。我指出，这就是这一行的传统名称。他坚持要我找到其他的描述方式。他拒绝向FDA提交承认存在误差的报告。我联系了康涅狄格大学的HF Smith教授，并解释了我的问题。他建议我将这一行称为“残差”，并指出在一些论文中，它被称为残差误差。我把这个建议告诉了其他在制药行业工作的统计学家，他们也开始使用这个名称。这最终成为大多数医学文献中的标准术语。至少在美国，似乎没有人会承认自己犯错。

[35] There is often a confusion between the ordinary meaning of words and the specific mathematical meaning when the same words appear in a statistical analysis. When I first began to work in the drug industry, one of my analyses included a traditional table of results, where one line referred to the uncertainty produced by small random fluctuations in the data. This line is called, in the traditional table, the “error.” One of the senior executives refused to send such a report to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. “How can we admit to having error in our data?” he asked, referring to the extensive efforts that had been made to be sure the clinical data were correct. I pointed out that this was the traditional name for that line. He insisted that I find some other way to describe it. He would not send a report admitting error to the FDA. I contacted H. F. Smith at the University of Connecticut and explained my problem. He suggested that I call the line the “residual,” pointing out that in some papers this is referred to as the residual error. I mentioned this to other statisticians working in the industry, and they began to use it. This eventually became the standard terminology in most of the medical literature. It seems that no one, in the United States at least, will admit to having error. <<

[36]在蒙特卡罗模拟中，使用随机数生成单个测量值，以模拟可能发生的实际事件。这个过程重复数千次，并将生成的测量值进行统计分析，以确定特定统计方法对所模拟情况的影响。该方法的名称来源于摩纳哥著名的蒙特卡罗赌场。

[36] In a Monte Carlo study, individual measurements are generated using random numbers to mimic the actual event that might occur. This is done many thousands of times over, and the resulting measurements are run through a statistical analysis to determine the effects of specific statistical methods on the situation being mimicked. The name is derived from that of the famous gambling casino in Monaco. <<

[37]霍桑工厂因“霍桑效应”而得名。20世纪30年代，霍桑工厂曾尝试测量两种管理方法之间的差异。由于工人们知道自己正受到密切观察，因此尝试失败了，因为他们对两种方法都表现出了极大的改进。自此，“霍桑效应”一词被用来描述仅仅因为进行实验而导致的情况改善。典型的例子是，大型临床试验在比较新疗法和传统疗法时，通常显示患者的健康状况有所改善，而且这种改善程度超过了基于以往经验对传统疗法的预期。这使得检测传统疗法和新疗法之间的疗效差异变得更加困难。

[37] The Hawthorne plant gave its name to a phenomenon known as the “Hawthorne effect” An attempt was made to measure the difference between two methods of management during the 1930s at the Hawthorne plant. The attempt failed because the workers improved their efforts immensely for both methods. This was because they knew they were being watched carefully. Since then, the term Hawthorne effect has been used to describe the improvement in a situation that occurs just because an experiment is being run. Typical is the fact that large clinical trials comparing new treatments with traditional ones usually show an improvement in patient health, more than would have been expected from the traditional one based on past experience. This makes it more difficult to detect the difference in effect between the traditional and the new treatment. <<

[38] 1963年，耶鲁大学的弗朗西斯·安斯康姆提出了一种完全不同的方法，这种方法更符合医疗需求。内曼-皮尔逊公式保留了分析师出错的比例。安斯康姆质疑，统计分析师的长期误差概率与判断医疗手段是否有效有何关系。安斯康姆提出，接受治疗的患者数量是有限的。其中一小部分患者将参与临床试验。其余患者将接受临床试验认定为“最佳”的治疗。如果试验中的患者数量过少，最佳治疗方案的判断就可能出错，如果出错，所有剩余的患者都将接受错误的治疗。如果试验中的患者数量过多，那么所有接受其他治疗（而非“最佳”治疗）的试验患者都将接受错误的治疗。安斯康姆提出，分析标准应该是尽可能减少接受较差治疗的患者总数（包括试验中的患者和之后接受治疗的患者）。

[38] In 1963, Francis Anscombe from Yale University proposed an entirely different approach that would be more in keeping with medical needs. The Neyman-Pearson formulation preserves the proportion of times the analyst will be wrong. Anscombe asked why the statistical analyst’s long-run probability of error had anything to do with deciding whether a medical treatment is effective. Instead, Anscombe proposed that there are a finite number of patients who will be treated. A small number of them will be treated in a clinical trial. The rest will be given the treatment that the clinical trial decides is “best.” If we use too small a number of patients in the trial, the decision of which treatment is best can be in error, and, if so, all the rest of the patients will be given the wrong treatment. If we use too many patients in the trial, then all the trial patients on the other treatments (not the “best” one) will have been put on the wrong treatment. Anscombe proposed that the criteria of analysis should be minimizing the total number of patients (both those in the trial and those who are treated afterward) who are given the poorer treatment. <<

[39]意大利法西斯主义初期非常重视家庭。因此，只有已婚男性才能担任政府职务，包括大学教职。1939年，才华横溢的布鲁诺·德·菲内蒂在全国范围内赢得了的里雅斯特大学数学系正教授的职位，但由于当时他还是单身，所以未能就职。

[39] In its initial form, Italian fascism was strongly profamily. Because of this, only married men were allowed to hold posts in government. These included positions on university faculties. In 1939, brilliant Bruno de Finetti won a nationwide competition for a position as full professor of mathematics at the University of Trieste, but he was not allowed to take it since he was, at that time, still a bachelor. <<

[40]十八世纪，欧几里得《几何原本》中的形式数学被翻译成几何教科书，逻辑演绎的模式也被系统化。在这种系统化框架下，“定理”一词被用来描述针对特定问题的结论。为了证明某些定理，通常需要证明一些中间结果，这些结果既可用于最终定理的证明，也可用于其他定理的证明。这样的结果被称为引理。

[40] During the eighteenth century, the formal mathematics of Euclid’s Elements were translated into geometry textbooks, and the patterns of logical deduction were codified. Under this codification, the word theorem was used to describe a conclusion that was specific to the problem at hand. In order to prove some theorems, it was often necessary to prove intermediate results that could be used in this final theorem, but would also be available for the proof of other theorems. Such a result was called a lemma. <<

[41]我的博士论文运用了一类分布，至少在统计学界，这类分布被称为“复合泊松分布”。在撰写论文的过程中，我不得不查阅相关文献，结果发现经济学、运筹学、电气工程和社会学领域都有类似的分布。有些地方称之为“断续泊松分布”，有些地方称之为“泊松-二项分布”，还有一篇论文称其为“第五大道公交车分布” 。

[41] My own Ph.D. thesis made use of a class of distributions known, at least among statisticians, as “compound-Poisson distributions.” As I worked on my thesis, I had to survey the literature, and I found the same distribution in economics, operations research, electrical engineering, and sociology. In some places it was called the “stuttering Poisson.” In other places it was the “Poisson-binomial.” In one paper, it was the “Fifth Avenue bus distribution.” <<
